Construction Services Offered

ADUS

Accessory Dwelling Units (ADUs) are additions or standalone backyard homes that add flexible living space and complement your property’s style. They can be used for guests, a home office, family, or rentals—often generating income and boosting long-term property value.

Extensions

Home extensions are seamless additions to your existing house, designed to create more living space while enhancing comfort and style. They blend with your home’s architecture, add value, and can be customized for anything from extra bedrooms to expanded kitchens or living areas.


Custom Homes

Custom homes let you build a space that fits your life—no compromises or cookie-cutter layouts. Designed around your needs and style, you choose the floor plan and finishes to create a one-of-a-kind home that boosts comfort, curb appeal, and long-term value.

Full Remodal

Full remodels transform your entire home with updated layouts, modern finishes, and improved functionality. They breathe new life into your space, enhance comfort, and boost property value while tailoring every detail to your lifestyle and design vision.


The Hamilton
Exteriors Difference

Best Price Guarantee

We promise the most competitive rates in the industry. If you find a lower rate elsewhere, we will gladly beat or match it for you.

Factory Trained Installers

All our installers are licensed, bonded, insured, and undergo thorough background and business checks.

Industry Leading Warranties

Our projects are protected by industry-leading warranties, including up to a 50-year material warranty and a 35-year labor warranty.

Personal Project Manager

Enjoy a seamless renovation with a dedicated project manager handling all details and communication.

Financing Options Available For Everyone

At Hamilton Exteriors, we offer flexible financing solutions for every homeowner. Whether you have high or low credit, we have options to fit your needs. Our partnerships with various lenders enable us to provide competitive rates and terms for all credit profiles. Don't let financial concerns delay your roofing project - let us help you find the perfect financing solution.
